narrative:
Green Twp. township has 45,853 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
